title: THE OVERHEARD CONVERSATION - 'You may be surprised'
text: Five nights before the ceremony, in the garden: 'It isn't fair. Everyone already knows he'll lead.' And the only true thing that wasn't a secret: 'You may be surprised.' A comfort to one child. A verdict overheard by the other.

verifyRoutes.hint: The garden itself can testify - stand at the study window and listen to how the wind edits sentences.
